metadata.title: Acme Health Minimum Security Baseline — SOC 2 TSC mapped to NIST 800-53 Rev 5
metadata.remarks: This profile selects the subset of NIST SP 800-53 Rev 5 controls that map to the SOC 2 Trust Services Criteria (TSC) addressed by the capstone GRC baseline. Controls are selected by their NIST ID; SOC 2 TSC cross-references are in the component definition.

values: PHI at rest in S3 and DynamoDB
Lambda execution role for patient intake processing
